overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a foggy night in a neon-lit urban plaza. A character sits on a concrete bench near a brightly lit underpass before standing up and walking away, with pedestrians visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with neon-lit pedestrian underpass

agents.ego_description: sitting on a concrete bench, occasionally shifting posture and looking around the plaza

notable_agents.action: walking through the neon-lit underpass tunnel in the background

entered.detail: modern concrete seating structure where the character is sitting
pedestrian tunnel illuminated with bright pink and purple neon lights
tall vertical light fixture with warm yellow illumination
dark metal public waste bin next to the bench
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying pink neon graphics
transparent safety barrier behind the bench overlooking the city

segments.scene_description: The character sits on a concrete bench in a foggy Night City plaza, surrounded by neon lights from a nearby underpass and digital billboards. The camera slowly orbits around the seated character while pedestrians walk through the illuminated tunnel in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with neon-lit pedestrian underpass

events.description: character stands up from the bench and begins walking away

agents.ego_description: standing up from the bench and walking away from the seating area toward the plaza

segments.scene_description: The character rises from the bench and begins walking, causing the camera to follow in third-person perspective. The concrete bench and trash can fall behind as the character moves through the foggy neon-lit plaza, with the illuminated underpass remaining visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a static, orbiting observation of a seated figure into a following perspective as they venture into a neon-lit urban plaza. It begins with the camera slowly circling a character resting on a concrete bench, surrounded by the glow of digital billboards and a foggy underpass where pedestrians drift through the light. As the character rises from the bench, the camera shifts its motion to follow from behind, leaving the bench and a nearby trash can in the wake of the movement. The scene then expands as the character walks further into the misty plaza, with the illuminated tunnel receding into the background while the vibrant neon lights continue to pierce through the fog.
